overall.description: A cinematic first-person walk through a foggy Victorian-era park at night, rendered in a video game engine. The camera moves from a fenced promenade into a garden centered around a tiered fountain, then continues through a park area with benches and a pergola, surrounded by historic mansions and Spanish moss-draped oak trees illuminated by warm gas lamps.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along a narrow fenced walkway at night, with an ornate iron fence on the left and wet stone pavement reflecting the warm glow of gas lamps. The camera moves forward past stone pillars, with a historic mansion barely visible through the fog in the distance, before transitioning into a more open garden area.

scene_state.functional_zone: central garden with tiered fountain and oak trees

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide garden plaza centered around a tiered stone fountain. The camera moves around the fountain, revealing a massive oak tree draped with Spanish moss and flowering bushes. The historic mansion remains visible in the left background while the iron fence disappears behind, creating an open, atmospheric park setting.

events.description: slowing slightly while approaching the wooden benches and pergola structure

segments.scene_description: Moving past the fountain, the camera enters a park area featuring wooden benches and a pergola structure ahead. The vegetation becomes denser with Spanish moss hanging from the oak trees. The historic mansion looms larger on the left as the camera approaches the seating area and pergola, with street lamps providing pools of warm light in the foggy darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, fenced promenade into an expansive, atmospheric Victorian garden. It begins along a narrow walkway of wet stone pavement, moving past an ornate iron fence and stone pillars while a historic mansion looms faintly through the night fog. As the path opens, the camera glides into a wide garden plaza and circles a tiered stone fountain, revealing a massive oak tree draped in Spanish moss and vibrant flowering bushes. The scene then shifts further into the park, passing wooden benches and moving toward a pergola structure as the vegetation densens. Finally, the camera approaches the seating area under pools of warm gaslight, with the historic mansion now looming larger against the foggy darkness.
